pr.title: Record: 0.2292 BPB — Dirichlet-Multinomial Smoothing + Distributed Prefill + 15-Gram + EBLS

output.summary: Hierarchical Dirichlet-Multinomial smoothing mixes the neural LM prior with up-to-15-gram counts using one concentration parameter instead of per-order multipliers.
techniques: Neural-prior Dirichlet-Multinomial smoothing applied recursively from bigrams to 15-grams
Complementary training downweights cache-easy tokens so the neural model learns what caching misses
Distributed cache prefill ensures sliding evaluation matches single-pass ordering
